question: What is the refund policy?
answer: Refunds are available within 30 days, but digital products are non-refundable.
contexts: Refunds are processed within 30 days from purchase.||Digital items are non-refundable unless required by law.
ground_truth: Customers can request refunds within 30 days, except digital products.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the email instructions.
contexts: To reset your password, click Forgot Password on the login page.||A reset link will be sent to your email.
ground_truth: Use the Forgot Password link on the login page and follow the reset email.

question: What programming languages does the API support?
answer: The API supports Python, JavaScript, Go, and Ruby SDKs.
contexts: Official SDKs are available in Python, JavaScript, Go, Ruby, and Java.||Community SDKs exist for other languages.
ground_truth: Python, JavaScript, Go, Ruby, and Java are supported.

question: Does the app support offline mode?
answer: Yes, the app supports full offline mode for all users.
contexts: The mobile app caches the last synced dashboard for 24 hours.||Full offline editing is not currently supported.
ground_truth: The app does not support full offline mode; only limited cached viewing exists.

question: Is SSO available on every plan?
answer: SSO is available only on the Enterprise plan.
contexts: Single sign-on SSO is included in the Enterprise plan.||Pro and Starter plans do not include SSO.
ground_truth: SSO is available on Enterprise only.

question: Can I export reports as CSV?
answer: Yes, reports can be exported as CSV and JSON.
contexts: Report export is available in CSV format from the analytics page.||Scheduled report delivery is available on Pro and Enterprise.
ground_truth: Reports can be exported as CSV.

question: What is the API rate limit?
answer: The public API allows 100 requests per minute per workspace.
contexts: The default public API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per workspace.||Burst traffic may be throttled.
ground_truth: The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per workspace.

question: How many team members are included in the Starter plan?
answer: The Starter plan includes up to 10 team members.
contexts: Starter includes up to 3 team members.||Pro includes up to 10 team members.

question: How many times are failed webhooks retried?
answer: Failed webhooks are retried up to 5 times over 24 hours.
contexts: Failed webhook deliveries are retried up to 5 times over a 24 hour period.||Webhook logs are visible in the developer console.
ground_truth: Failed webhooks are retried up to 5 times over 24 hours.

question: How do I delete a workspace?
answer: Workspace owners can delete a workspace from billing settings after exporting data.
contexts: Workspace deletion is available in workspace settings for owners only.||Export your data before deletion because it is permanent.
ground_truth: Owners can delete a workspace from workspace settings, and exporting data first is recommended.
